0._value: Having reached level 30 and mastered the way of the Magician, I feel the urge to learn even more.

1._value: Perhaps #b#p313##k of #b#m10002000##k could teach me greater lessons.

2._value: #b#p313##k said that if I can pass the test he gives, he’ll gladly teach me more. I’m no longer the weakling I once was, but hearing that I still have to face a trial makes me a bit nervous.

0._value: Finally, I’ve reached level 30! It hasn’t been easy, but now I’m confident I can stand as a true Magician who won’t lose to anyone. Still… is this really enough? The world is vast, and I find myself wanting to learn more.

1._value: I should probably visit #b#p313##k in #b#m10002000##k again. He might be able to teach me things I’ve never known.

0._value: Aren’t you that beginner from before? I can see in your bright eyes that the fear you once had is long gone.

1._value: There’s no need for a long explanation—you want to learn more, don’t you? Seeing young people like you... now I'm motivated.

2._value: But first, I need to see if you’re truly ready. If you’re prepared to take my test, come speak to me again.
